retrieved_result: Defining Modules \"This tutorial is for Dojo 1.8 and may be out of date. Up to date tutorials are available. Defining Modules Dojo now supports modules written in the Asynchronous Module Definition (AMD) format, which makes code easier to author and debug. In this tutorial, we learn all about this new module format,
Decision_Reason: The retrieved page discusses Dojo AMD module definitions and debugging code, not API integration debugging; it is not primarily about or strongly relevant to debugging API integration.

history.description: "This tutorial is for Dojo 1.8 and may be out of date. Up to date tutorials are available. Defining Modules Dojo now supports modules written in the Asynchronous Module Definition (AMD) format, which makes code easier to author and debug.
